description: Multicoloured kurta with tones of pink, purple and blue, has a round neckline, is sleeveless, has rust brown piping around the neckline and armholes, has a black fabric belt on the waist and a vented hem Multicoloured kurta with tones of pink, purple and blue, has a round neckline, is sleeveless, has rust brown piping around the neckline and armholes, has a black fabric belt on the waist and a vented hem
